uplink.description: TTN example: proximity (mm), amplitude, battery, temperature and a live GPS fix near Mannheim
Synthetic: temperature, distance (mm), amplitude, battery and a northern-hemisphere GPS fix with negative longitude
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds payload; expected values produced by running reference/upstream-codec.js (temp 17.5C float32, distance 2500mm, amplitude 200, battery status 1 voltage 36->3.6V, lat 51123456e-6, lon -654321e-6).

uplink.description: Synthetic: sub-zero temperature, water-body level, filling level, battery and a southern-hemisphere GPS fix
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds payload; expected values produced by running reference/upstream-codec.js (temp -3.2C float32, water body level 336mm, filling level 75%, battery 3.5V, lat -33865000e-6, lon 151209900e-6).

uplink.description: Synthetic: distance-only diagnostic uplink with no GPS records (proximity raw, amplitude, battery)
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds payload; expected values produced by running reference/upstream-codec.js (proximity raw 1721, amplitude 255, battery 3.6V; no GPS records so no position is emitted).

uplink.description: Truncated TLV record (length runs past the buffer) is rejected
